name: playground-template
_comment_overrides: @polkadot-api/json-rpc-provider override is a workaround for an upstream packaging bug (mirrors what product-sdk's monorepo does). @novasamatech/host-api* pinned to exact 0.8.7 to match the live playground-app: product-sdk-host@0.10.0 requires host-api ^0.8.7. NOTE: host-api 0.8.4+ had a handshake regression against older Polkadot Desktop builds — verify the Host API connects in Desktop before shipping; if it hangs on 'Polkadot host is not ready', revert host-api* to 0.8.3 and product-sdk-host below 0.10.0.
